textByHash.3e8ae292acaa1bcd5c7c8f4cb43e6b08011e25a0: So be it. You know where to find me if you change your mind.
textByHash.8271e19a469d841add4f9dd2e8b931fdcea27b94: Good, you're here. I take it you received Idria's message?
textByHash.879640bcdc0dfcc867513f55481f8f3590f7b297: Hello there, friend. I hope things are going well for you. If you're in need of any help with... anything, perhaps you might want to talk to Thaerisk upstairs...
textByHash.8bf783224293f2d90f37fec0885a692e17305419: Good. Meet Thaerisk upstairs. There is much to discuss and Lucien's spies are everywhere.
textByHash.b27caf88f88ef99a2231e7432a5112e420f884fc: It was not delivered to you? This is concerning... Still, the point is you're here. Now, are you willing to help us?
textByHash.ed7ae15ea202a026baaef8c8d531a7575a7e2bd8: They will have to wait. There is only one question of importance at the moment: Are you willing to help us?
textByHash.fadfc043ab7feb786bc1e414aa2ce89a6e200d1d: What are you waiting for? Thaerisk is waiting for you upstairs.
